title: Section 41
content: 1[41. Disqualification for being an election agent.--Any person who is for the time being disqualified under the Constitution or under this Act for being a member of either House of Parliament or the House or either House of the Legislature of a State or for voting at elections, shall, so long as the disqualification subsists, also be disqualified for being an election agent at any election.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 47 of 1966, s. 31, for section 41 (w.e.f. 14-12-1966).
